message:
🐛 Fix Operator Status card calling wrong API endpoint (#896)

The operators hook was calling `/api/mcp/operators` which doesn't
exist. The correct endpoint is `/api/gitops/operators` (registered
in server.go). Requests were silently failing and returning empty
data, causing "No operators" to display even when operators exist.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
